name: test_nextset_with_more_sets
description:
Test nextset when there are more result sets.

        The implementation seems to add rowsets correctly, but behaves differently
        than expected when accessing them via nextset.
descriptionHtml:
Test nextset when there are more result sets.

    The implementation seems to add rowsets correctly, but behaves differently
    than expected when accessing them via nextset.
